sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81794" key="perioixne/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιοιχνέω</orth>, <sense id="n81794.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">run round</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">about</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0688.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agathocl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
